text:
On Thu, 6 Jan 2011 18:10:15 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote: 

>
Maintainer of mail/assp,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/153736 has just
been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an
enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating
that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
>
The full text of the PR can be found at:
>
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/153736 [1]

I permit
this repo copy. 

Rusty Nejdl
